case_title: KEN CHAN VS. ROBINSON MELAD BASA JR

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED OCT-17-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BASA JR, ROBINSON MELAD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, KEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BASA JR, ROBINSON MELAD $1,035.06 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,105.06, DEFENDANT IS LIABLE FOR THE ACCIDENT BECAUSE HE DID NOT HAVE THE RIGHT OF WAY YET PROCEEDED. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $150.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JAN-15-2019 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,035.06 FILED BY CHAN, KEN AS TO DEFENDANT BASA JR, ROBINSON MELAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2018 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-15-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BASA JR, ROBINSON MELAD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, KEN AS TO DEFENDANT BASA JR, ROBINSON MELAD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF KEN CHAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBINSON MELAD BASA, JR. IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
